data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — test framework uses assert.sh helpers, temp git repos via mktemp -d/git init. Library will be at plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh with functions: ms_is_merge_in_progress, ms_is_rebase_in_progress, ms_get_worktree_only_files, ms_get_merge_base. Tests use _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR env var override for isolation.
